rules.description: WAF rule sets are constantly updated to guard against new attacks. Upgrading to the latest DRS version will provide enhanced engine performance, better protection, and a reduction in false positives. It is recommended to use the latest DRS rule set version.
rules.query: extend ruleset1=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[0], ruleset2=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[1], ruleSetType1=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[0].ruleSetType, ruleSetType2=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[1].ruleSetType | where (ruleSetType1 =~ "OWASP" and (ruleset1["ruleSetVersion"] in ("2.2.9","3.0","3.1","3.2"))) or (ruleSetType2 =~ "OWASP" and (ruleset2["ruleSetVersion"] in ("2.2.9","3.0","3.1","3.2")))
rules.fix: use the latest DRS rule set version

rules.description: Usage of CRS 2.2.9 is no longer supported for new WAF policies. We recommend you upgrade to the latest DRS version. Upgrading to DRS 2.1 or later will migrate WAF to a newer engine with larger scale limits, enhanced performance, better protection and fewer false positive.
rules.query: mv-expand properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets | extend RuleType=properties_managedRules_managedRuleSets.ruleSetType, RuleSetVersion=properties_managedRules_managedRuleSets.ruleSetVersion | where RuleType == "OWASP" and RuleSetVersion == "2.2.9"
rules.fix: Usage of CRS 2.2.9 is no longer supported for new WAF policies. We recommend you upgrade to the latest DRS version. Upgrading to DRS 2.1 or later will migrate WAF to a newer engine with larger scale limits, enhanced performance, better protection and fewer false positive.

rules.description: Bot protection in Web Application Firewall (WAF) will protect you application against malicious bots, crawlers and scanners. Using the latest version of bot Protection rule set will ensure the WAF engine will apply the latest rules.
rules.query: mv-expand properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets | extend ruleSetType=properties_managedRules_managedRuleSets.ruleSetType, ruleSetVersion=properties_managedRules_managedRuleSets.ruleSetVersion | where ruleSetType == "Microsoft_BotManagerRuleSet" and ruleSetVersion== "0.1"
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation
